company.name_jp: アーネスト開発株式会社

research_notes: Researched for individual executive social profiles (LinkedIn/Twitter). No profiles found via website scraping. Web search API unavailable (MiniMax key missing). Company website accessed on 2026-06-26 but has encoding issues preventing executive profile extraction. Representative: 新海 貴浩. Company provides SES (System Engineering Services) with 'Engineer-First' philosophy. Based in Yokohama, 15 employees.
